ddls:
CREATE TABLE "growth_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "height" REAL /* Height measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight measurement in kilograms */,
  "head_circumference" REAL /* Head circumference in centimeters */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index */,
  "z_score_height" REAL /* Z-score for height */,
  "z_score_weight" REAL /* Z-score for weight */,
  "z_score_BMI" REAL /* Z-score for BMI */,
  "percentile_height" REAL /* Percentile for height */,
  "percentile_weight" REAL /* Percentile for weight */,
  "percentile_BMI" REAL /* Percentile for BMI */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "child_name" TEXT /* Full name of the child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent or guardian */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any existing medical conditions */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last healthcare visit */,
  "next_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled healthcare visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 3/4 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pediatrician, researcher, parent) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address for the user */,
  "parent_child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child (if the user is a parent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_parent_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent or guardian */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent or guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the parent or guardian */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address for the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent or guardian */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user (healthcare provider) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, video) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., login, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
